excluded_categories.reason: No requirement or business rule related to user roles, access control, or permissions is present in the confirmed summary.
No requirement or dependency related to network conditions, connectivity, or offline behavior is mentioned.
No requirement for language, locale, or regional formatting is provided.
No requirement for timezone handling or date/time conversion is specified.

scenario_generation_rules: Generate positive scenarios for successful account creation with valid data, successful email verification, and resend of verification link after 60 seconds.

Generate negative scenarios for each validation rule violation: duplicate email, invalid email format, password length out of range, missing character types, consecutive spaces, password containing email prefix/username, confirm password mismatch, expired verification link, and resend before 60 seconds.
Generate boundary scenarios for password length (8 and 12 characters exactly, 7 and 13 characters), and for resend timing (exactly 60 seconds, 59 seconds, 61 seconds).
Generate business rule scenarios for email uniqueness (BR001), password rules (BR002-BR005), verification link expiration (BR006), and resend cooldown (FR004).
Generate security scenarios for password complexity enforcement, rate limiting on resend, token expiration, and prevention of password containing email prefix/username.
Generate UX/UI scenarios for inline error messages on duplicate email, invalid password length, and invalid email format (VAL008).
Generate integration scenarios for email verification system dependency (DEP001) and token expiration/resend logic dependency (DEP002).
Do not generate scenarios for phone number, first name, last name validation, or error messages not explicitly listed in VAL008, as these are open questions.
